text: 'MobLand' Mess: Tom Hardy 'Refused' to Come Out of Trailer - The Hollywood Reporter

text: 'Emily in Paris' Star Pierre Deny Dead at 69 After ALS Battle - TMZ

text: 5 of 7 people trapped in flooded Laos cave for more than a week found alive, rescuers say - CBS News
fullText: Five villagers stuck in a flooded cave in central Laos for more than a week were found alive, rescuers said Wednesday, but two others are missing.

text: Minneapolis Police Chief Brian O'Hara resigns after internal probe into his conduct, mayor says - CBS News
fullText: Mayor Jacob Frey announced O'Hara's resignation late Tuesday after an investigation found he deleted a contact from his city-issued phone to hide his connection to an employee during a prior investigation.

text: Clyburn's district stays intact as South Carolina Republicans scrap redistricting - NPR
fullText: The majority-Black district held for 34 years by South Carolina Democratic Rep. Jim Clyburn will survive intact, for now, after Republican state lawmakers rejected a plan to redraw congressional maps.

text: Memory Chip Frenzy Sends SK Hynix, Micron Into $1 Trillion Club - Bloomberg.com
fullText: The breakneck surge in memory-chip stocks is intensifying, sending the market capitalizations of SK Hynix Inc. and Micron Technology Inc. above $1 trillion for the first time, as investors bet the AI boom will lead to a sustained revaluation of the industry.
